rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §43.031 governs polling place locations in public buildings. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: The building selected for a polling place shall be a public building if practicable.
_note: No conflict; proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Elec. Code §43.031 polling-place requirements.
